title: An Amulet's Glow
body:
I tried to collect most of the MCSM-based mods into 1 modpack.
There will be some items of the same object from three different mods below, and the working amulet will only be found in the Cracker's Wither Storm mod.

This modpack features the following mods:
- Cracker's Wither Storm Mod by nonamecrackers2
- Armor of the Story Orden Stone by mrzombi37
- Spayzers' Story Mode Additions by Spayzers

This modpack will fit with an imported world recreation of various episodes' maps from MCSM.

"What's New?"
- Various mobs from MCSM
- Armor from MCSM 
- Items from MCSM 
- Structures

A Problem with Spayzers'Story Mode Additions -
- Sometimes, the armor does not fit on your skin, making some parts go inside your skin.
  It's either a problem only I have or the mod itself. Nevertheless, the mod is awesome and you should go check it out
